title: Amphilophis ensiformis
taxonomy: Amphilophis ensiformis is a species of snake in the family Dipsadidae. It is native to South America and is a non-venomous species. The classification of Amphilophis ensiformis is as follows: kingdom Animalia, phylum Chordata, class Reptilia, order Squamata, family Dipsadidae, genus Amphilophis. This classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. The genus Amphilophis is part of the family Dipsadidae, which is a group of non-venomous snakes.
